title: Internal naming cleanup: beads→binds in DB schema, git config keys, variable names
description:
Remaining internal 'beads' references that don't affect users but are confusing for contributors:
- beads.db filename → binds.db (needs migration path)
- git config keys: beads.role, merge.beads.driver
- Go variable names: beadsDir, FindBeadsDir, hasBeadsProjectFiles, etc.
- Package name: internal/beads/ → internal/binds/
- BEADS_DIR env var → BINDS_DIR
- config table key naming
Tier 4 rename — purely internal, no user impact. Consider doing alongside beads_rust rewrite if that happens.
notes: DEFERRED 2026-04-23: user reconsidering 'binds' name itself — hold all internal rename work until name is resettled.

title: Rebrand CONTRIBUTING, LICENSE, SECURITY from upstream beads to binds
close_reason: Completed in full rebrand sweep — 167 files, all steveyegge/beads→IkuTri/binds refs updated

title: Add first-class metadata support to binds mail messages
description: Mail messages already have a metadata column in storage, but the CLI and server path do not currently accept or emit message metadata. Add a supported metadata path so Codex/Symphony-style day-memory messages can carry structured context about manually driven external-tool sessions without automating those tools. Intended boundary: record human-operated Claude Code progress and handoff state; do not script, feed, or control Claude Code.
acceptance_criteria: binds mail send accepts validated JSON metadata via CLI, the mail send HTTP API accepts the same metadata, Store.SendMessage persists it into messages.metadata, JSON inbox/history/thread responses include metadata when present, malformed metadata is rejected with a clear error, tests cover CLI/API/store behavior, and docs/help explain the manual-tool-session use case and automation boundary.

title: Wire mail metadata through CLI, API, and store
description: Implement the metadata plumbing for binds-6vp. Add mail send CLI input for metadata JSON, extend the server request type, pass metadata through Store.SendMessage, persist messages.metadata, and emit metadata from JSON message views without cluttering default human output.
acceptance_criteria: CLI accepts metadata JSON from a safe flag or file input, malformed JSON fails before send, server request schema carries metadata, store insert writes metadata, messageToJSON and related JSON inbox/history/thread output include metadata when present, and existing mail send behavior remains compatible for messages without metadata.

title: Add mail metadata tests and worklog docs
description: Add focused coverage and operator docs for the binds-6vp metadata path. Include the day-memory/manual-tool-session use case: Codex may record progress metadata for work the user manually drives in Claude Code, but binds must not imply automation of Claude Code.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover valid metadata, invalid metadata rejection, persisted metadata retrieval, absent metadata compatibility, and JSON output shape. Help/docs include example metadata for manual_tool_session with fields like tool, mode, repo, ticket, state, next, and boundary, plus a short note that this is logging/handoff metadata only.

title: Document Codex CLI identity setup for binds mail
description: Add Codex CLI integration docs covering agent registration, BINDS_TOKEN per-process behavior, zellij/session inheritance caveats, and the recommended wrapper-based launch pattern for dedicated identities like linux-codex.
close_reason: Added Codex CLI integration docs, linked them from the main README and website intro, and documented the dedicated BINDS_TOKEN wrapper pattern plus zellij/per-process identity behavior.

title: Add BINDS_HOST env var + server.host config for cross-machine clients
Add rich identity flags to binds registry register
description: The server-side agent schema already supports model, scope, machine, and capabilities, but the CLI registry register command still only sends name and agent_type. Add flags so Codex/Claude/aider users can register a full identity without dropping to raw curl.
close_reason: Shipped: CLI now accepts --model, --machine, --scope, --capabilities flags on 'binds registry register'. Smoke-tested against live server — all fields persist correctly.

title: binds-tui: Bubble Tea TUI viewer
description: Build a Go TUI using Bubble Tea (charmbracelet) that reads from .binds/beads.db. Issue list, detail view, dep graph, keyboard workflow (claim/close/create). Replaces beads-viewer.

title: Fix SQLite DSN bug — file: URI form for cross-platform compat
